div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://fhir.et/core/CodeSystem/hiv-prevention-services-cs defines the following codes:

tr.td: Offer male and female condoms and condom-compatible lubricants
Offer pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for people at substantial ongoing risk of HIV infection
Offer post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) following suspected exposure
Harm reduction for people who inject drugs
Behavioural interventions to support risk reduction, particularly for people with HIV and members of key populations
HIV testing for partners and biological children
HIV testing for partners and social contacts of people from key populations, where appropriate

title.value: HIV Prevention Services and Referrals CodeSystem

description.value: Prevention services offered and referrals provided

display.value: Offer male and female condoms and condom-compatible lubricants
Offer pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for people at substantial ongoing risk of HIV infection
Offer post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) following suspected exposure
Harm reduction for people who inject drugs
Behavioural interventions to support risk reduction, particularly for people with HIV and members of key populations
HIV testing for partners and biological children
HIV testing for partners and social contacts of people from key populations, where appropriate
